portfolio_context.accelerator_boundary: Global Switch supplies colocation space, power, cooling and connectivity. It is NVIDIA DGX-Ready and supports customer AI/HPC equipment, but does not disclose a Global Switch-owned or hosted GPU inventory by model, site, count, delivery state, power draw or utilization.
portfolio_context.capacity_boundary: The 497MW directory checksum, 488MVA utility supply, 252MW saleable capacity, site engineering values, 38.8MW new signings and customer load use different definitions and are not additive.
